items.title: Personal Knowledge Base (this project)
items.summary: Build a personal info manager using Claude Code as the input interface and a Next.js / Vercel app as the browsing UI. Claude fetches URLs, generates summaries, writes JSON files, and commits to GitHub — Vercel auto-deploys on every push.
items.content:
## Stack
- Next.js App Router + TypeScript + Tailwind
- JSON files in GitHub as data store
- Claude Code as the input layer
- Vercel for hosting

## Key insight
Using git as the data sync mechanism means zero backend cost and full version history.

items.title: Weekend Coding Challenges Newsletter
items.summary: A weekly email with one well-scoped coding challenge, delivered every Friday. Each challenge comes with a test suite, a reference solution revealed on Monday, and a leaderboard. Target audience: developers who want to stay sharp without grinding LeetCode.
